title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. heterotricha
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. heterotricha, also known as the Himalayan rose, is a type of hybrid rose plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. heterotricha include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
